privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Power BI fiscal year report using synthetic data generated for 2023-2024 with daily revenue across three divisions (North, South, Global). The data exhibits seasonality with higher revenues in Q4 (Oct-Dec). The fiscal year is April 1 to March 31, requiring a DATESYTD measure with year-end parameter '03/31' or '3/31'. The critical requirement is that the chart's X-axis must display months chronologically starting with April and ending with March. The output file must be saved as Fiscal_Report.pbix on the Desktop.
